articles.title: Jaylen Brown pushes back against report of ‘frustration’ with Celtics: ‘I love Boston’
articles.description:

articles.title: Sonny Gray shuts down Tigers in return from injury, Red Sox finish sweep with 4-0 win
articles.description:
Gray (3-1) was making his first start since facing the Tigers on April 20 at Fenway Park — a game he left after 2 2/3 innings with a strained hamstring.
